projectDescription: A community-maintained extension repository for Mihon and Tachiyomi variants, providing hundreds of manga, manhwa, and manhua source extensions as installable Android APKs.
keyFeatures: Support for 20+ languages including English, Japanese, Spanish, Portuguese, and more
Compatible with Mihon, Tachiyomi, and all major forks
Machine-readable index.json for programmatic extension discovery
NSFW content filtering support via nsfw field in extension metadata
Self-hosted source support (Komga, LANraragi, Mango, Kavita)
Simple one-URL repo setup via index.min.json
Automated CI/CD build and publish pipeline
publicApiSurface: GET https://raw.githubusercontent.com/keiyoushi/extensions/repo/index.json — full extension index with sources metadata
index.json extension object: { name, pkg, apk, lang, code, version, nsfw, sources[] }
source object: { name, lang, id, baseUrl, versionId }
